document.raw_narrative:
Condition: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with neuropathy
Condition: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic retinopathy

codings.display: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic neuropathy

structured_facts.text: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic retinopathy

codings.display: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with unspecified diabetic retinopathy with macular edema

principal_diagnosis.description: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic neuropathy, unspecified
principal_diagnosis.reasoning: Patient has documented Type 2 diabetes with neuropathy complication. E11.40 is the combination code per ICD-10-CM convention of coding diabetes with its complications using a single code.

secondary_codes.description: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with unspecified diabetic retinopathy with macular edema
secondary_codes.evidence_text: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic retinopathy
secondary_codes.reasoning: FHIR bundle includes coded condition for diabetic retinopathy with macular edema (E11.311). This is a separate diabetic complication requiring its own code.

alternatives.description: Type 2 DM with unspecified diabetic retinopathy without macular edema

coding_result.sequencing_rationale: E11.40 (Type 2 DM with neuropathy) is sequenced as principal diagnosis. E11.311 (Type 2 DM with retinopathy) is secondary. Both are diabetic complications coded with combination codes per ICD-10-CM guidelines.

documentation_gaps.physician_query: The documentation indicates diabetic neuropathy. Can you specify the type (mononeuropathy, polyneuropathy, autonomic neuropathy) and severity for more precise coding?
documentation_gaps.cot_trace: Step 1: E11.40 is 'unspecified' diabetic neuropathy. Step 2: ICD-10-CM has specific codes: E11.41 (mononeuropathy), E11.42 (polyneuropathy), E11.43 (autonomic). Step 3: Type of neuropathy not documented. Step 4: Query needed for specificity.

documentation_gaps.physician_query: The diabetic retinopathy is coded as 'unspecified.' Can you document the severity stage (mild, moderate, or severe nonproliferative; or proliferative) based on the latest ophthalmology exam?
documentation_gaps.evidence_text: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic retinopathy
documentation_gaps.cot_trace: Step 1: E11.311 codes unspecified retinopathy with macular edema. Step 2: ICD-10-CM has specific severity codes (E11.321x for mild NPDR, E11.331x for moderate, etc.). Step 3: Severity stage not documented. Step 4: Ophthalmology findings needed.

cot_traces: Step 1: E11.40 is 'unspecified' diabetic neuropathy. Step 2: ICD-10-CM has specific codes: E11.41 (mononeuropathy), E11.42 (polyneuropathy), E11.43 (autonomic). Step 3: Type of neuropathy not documented. Step 4: Query needed for specificity.

Step 1: E11.311 codes unspecified retinopathy with macular edema. Step 2: ICD-10-CM has specific severity codes (E11.321x for mild NPDR, E11.331x for moderate, etc.). Step 3: Severity stage not documented. Step 4: Ophthalmology findings needed.

E11.311: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic retinopathy
